title: pyrus malus var. pumila
intro: Pyrus malus var. pumila, also known as the dwarf apple tree or Siberian crabapple, is a small deciduous shrub or tree belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus malus var. pumila include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
